import './Post.css' import React, {useState, useEffect} from 'react' import { Link, useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import axios from "axios"; import {MoreVert} from "@mui/icons-material"; import {Users} from '../../seeds/Seeds' const PostContent = ({post}) => { const [like, setLike] = useState(post.like) const [liked, setLiked] = useState(false) const [dislike, setDislike] = useState(post.dislike) const [disliked, setDisliked] = useState(false) const likeHandler = () => { setLike(liked ? like -1 : like +1) setLiked(!liked) } const dislikeHandler = () => { setDislike(disliked ? dislike -1 : dislike +1) setDisliked(!disliked) } return (
u.id === post.id)[0].profilePicture}/> {Users.filter((u) => u.id === post.id)[0].username} {post.date}
{post.status_body}
{/*
{like} liked {dislike} disliked
{post.comments} comments
*/}
) } export default PostContent
